title: Nursery Rhyme. CXCIV. Riddles.
content:
[An egg.]

        Humpty Dumpty lay in a beck,[*]
        With all his sinews round his neck;
        Forty doctors and forty wrights
        Couldn't put Humpty Dumpty to rights!

            [Footnote *: A brook.]
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CXCIV. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
